name: Chicken Fried Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Season half a cup of flour with salt and black pepper to taste.
2. Pat the cube steaks dry with paper towels and dredge them in the seasoned flour. Set aside while preparing the batter.
3. In a bowl, beat the egg and buttermilk together. Gradually add the remaining cup of flour, constantly stirring until the mixture is smooth and thick.
4. Season the batter with salt and black pepper.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 370 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Dip each steak into the batter and carefully place them into the hot oil.
7. Fry the steaks until they are golden brown, turning once, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Ensure that the oil returns to 370 degrees Fahrenheit before cooking additional batches.
9. Drain the fried steaks on paper towels before serving.
